## Structure

UDP S→C 0x03/0x07/0x04 — **Multipart with discriminator 0x04**.
Same general shape as `udp_s2c_03_07_03` (also carries
"MailControl" ASCII content). Single 1726-byte reassembled
body across 2 fragments.

```
[0..5]   multipart_header (per multipart_framing.md)
[6..]    [0x04 discriminator][total_size LE32][payload]
```

Sample inner (first 32B):
```
00 00 02 00 00 00 04 be 06 00 00 21 17 0c 00 01 00 07 00 4d 61 69 6c 43 6f 6e 74 72 6f 6c 00 07
                                        ↑                "MailControl\0"
```

Discriminator 0x04 + the "MailControl" ASCII suggests this is
a **mail-related multipart channel**, paired with the disc-0x03
form. Possibly representing different mail folders (inbox /
sent / archive) or mail-update sub-types (new / read / deleted).
